adjudication.root_cause: The clarified v5 contract was followed on six tasks but the local quantized Qwen3-4B generator contradicted explicit facts on two tasks, including calling a label-contaminated self-adjudicated evaluation immediately admissible with no blocker. The remaining failure is attributed to generator-role adequacy on this canary rather than another label repair.
adjudication.why_not_lower_the_floor: The prospective 7/8 floor distinguishes a usable answer-channel canary from a generator that misses multiple explicit decisive facts. Lowering it after observing 6/8 would be retrospective acceptance.

prospective_v6_requirements: Keep the v5 tasks, construct, labels, 7/8 floors, and zero-disagreement rule semantically unchanged under a new protocol identity.
Substitute a separately cached local model and record its exact snapshot and claim ceiling.
Retain one-shot generation, candidate-before-label closure, two evaluators, no hosted chat, and no retrospective v5 rescore.
non_claims: This is a bounded generator-role diagnosis, not a model benchmark.
No campaign or support claim follows.
